response.justification: Bogdan comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with a broad, hands-on career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure work, and his long-running GISCollective founder role satisfies the entrepreneurial preference. However, this is a director-level AI strategy position that calls for recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms, and his AI exposure appears limited to recent AI-agent tooling contributions (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) rather than leading AI product development. There is also no evidence of principal-level strategic scope, customer advisory work, or industry thought leadership at the level the role demands, making him a plausible but risky stretch candidate.
strengths: 25+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Genuine entrepreneurial track record as founder and long-term maintainer of the open-source GISCollective geo-data platform
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale the role requires
Career has been senior/staff-level product engineering; no evidence of director-level strategic, advisory, or cross-org leadership
Limited visible depth in cloud platform strategy or ML systems beyond general full-stack and infrastructure work

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth vs. role requirements
Breadth and length of engineering experience
